api_key.description: Freshdesk API key. Sent as the HTTP Basic username (password is the literal X); never logged.

base_url.description: Freshdesk API base URL, e.g. https://<domain>/api/v2 (domain example: acme.freshdesk.com). This bundle requires the full /api/v2 base URL directly: legacy derives it from a bare domain config value, but that cross-key derivation (host validation + /api/v2 suffixing) has no engine mechanism today (see docs.md Known limits).

start_date.description: RFC3339 lower bound; for the tickets stream only, objects updated at or after this time are read (updated_since). Other streams ignore this value, matching legacy.

max_pages.description: Maximum pages; use 0, all, or unlimited to exhaust the stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
